title: Marketing Projects
text:
📂 Marketing Projects
A collection of academic and professional marketing work covering strategy, brand analysis, and presentations.



  
  
    
      🍎
      Strategic Business Analysis on Apple
    
    
      📄 PDF
      
        A comprehensive strategic business analysis of Apple Inc., examining market positioning, competitive advantage, and long-term growth strategy.
      
      
        Brand Strategy
        Competitive Analysis
        Apple Inc.
      
      View Project →
    
  

  
  
    
      📰
      Current Events Marketing Presentation
    
    
      📊 PowerPoint
      
        A presentation analyzing current marketing trends and real-world business events, connecting classroom concepts to industry developments.
      
      
        Current Events
        Market Trends
        IBM 3072
      
      View Project →
    
  

  
  
    
      📋
      MHR3010 – Final Management Report on Apple Inc.
    
    
      📄 PDF
      
        A formal management report produced for MHR3010 covering foundational marketing principles including consumer behavior, segmentation, and promotional strategy as applied to Apple Inc.
      
      
        Consumer Behavior
        Segmentation
        MHR3010
      
      View Project →
    
  

  
  
    
      🏢
      IBM Project – Target Market Plan (Part 1)
    
    
      📝 Google Doc
      
        Part 1 of a Target Market Plan developed for Cal Poly Pomona's College of Business Administration, identifying and analyzing IBM's core customer segments and strategic market opportunities.
      
      
        Target Market
        IBM
        Cal Poly Pomona
        Market Segmentation
      
      View Project →
    
  

  
  
    
      🏢
      IBM Project – Target Market Plan (Part 2)
    
    
      📝 Google Doc
      
        Part 2 of the IBM Target Market Plan, expanding on customer segmentation with deeper analysis of positioning strategy, competitive landscape, and go-to-market recommendations.
      
      
        Target Market
        IBM
        Cal Poly Pomona
        Go-To-Market
      
      View Project →
    
  

  
  
    
      🏈
      NFL – National Football League Marketing Analysis
    
    
      📊 PowerPoint
      
        A marketing analysis and presentation on the National Football League, exploring brand strategy, fan engagement, sponsorship, and the NFL's broader marketing ecosystem.
      
      
        NFL
        Sports Marketing
        Brand Analysis
        Fan Engagement
      
      View Project →
    
  

  
  
    
      🧹
      M06 Reflection Essay – Advanced Data Wrangling
    
    
      📘 Quarto
      
        A reflection essay exploring advanced Tidyverse wrangling techniques including across(), rowwise(), anti_join(), and factor handling. Covers David Robinson's live screencast analysis and a Revealjs presentation on portfolio construction.
      
      
        Tidyverse
        Data Wrangling
        R / Quarto
        Reflection
      
      View Project →
    
  

  
  
    
      ⚙️
      M11 Application – Introduction to Functional Programming in R
    
    
      📘 Quarto
      
        A hands-on R programming application covering functional programming concepts including conditional logic, loops, custom functions, apply/map families, and data visualization using real-world student-teacher ratio data.
      
      
        Functional Programming
        R / Quarto
        purrr
        ggplot2
      
      View Project →

title: Hello and Welcome, I’m Geovanni Flores!
text:
Currently I am a student at Cal Poly Pomona perusing my bachelors degree in business, majoring in marketing. I have gained experience through social media management, and now newly learned data analysis.
Fun fact: I have a passion in traveling and taking photos!
